body.title: CLOSED: day-close Discussions → agent_datacenter repo
body.result: Discussions enabled on agent_datacenter repo; day-close skill updated with new repositoryId=R_kgDOSOSpkA, categoryId=DIC_kwDOSOSpkM4C8i8p (General)
body.description:
CC is now based in agent_datacenter. Day-close GitHub Discussions (the daily work log) belong in the agent_datacenter repo, not TheIgors.

Two changes:
1. Update the day-close skill to create Discussions in agent_datacenter repo (get the repo/category IDs via `gh api graphql`).
2. Update cc_queue.py GitHub issue creation to default to agent_datacenter for non-Igor tickets (worker=claude tickets tagged AgentDatacenter/Infrastructure/Workflow/Swarm); Igor-specific tickets (worker=igor, tagged Cognition/Memory/etc.) stay in TheIgors.

Existing discussions in TheIgors stay — not worth migrating history.

**Affected files:** ~/.claude/skills/day-close/SKILL.md (repo/category IDs), TheIgors/lab/claudecode/cc_queue.py (gh issue routing)
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** IN — future day-close Discussions go to agent_datacenter; new ADC-tagged tickets file GH issues in agent_datacenter; existing history untouched. OUT — migrating past discussions.
**Test plan:** Run a day-close dry-run; verify Discussion creation targets agent_datacenter; file a test ticket and confirm GH issue lands in correct repo.
**Pass condition:** `gh api repos/akienm/agent_datacenter/discussions` shows a new day-close Discussion after next /day-close run.
